fullText: NEW: Residents of rural Texas town complain of “permanent artificial daylight” caused by nearby data centers.

fullText: JUST IN: Spain demands the immediate release of Spanish citizen Saif Abukeshek, taken from the Gaza flotilla to Israel for “questioning.”
